backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ICP backend that manages user analyses, profiles, and settings with role-based access control and blob storage mixins. Defines types for analysis results, timeframes, and candlestick patterns, and exposes query/update methods for storing and retrieving data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels. Covers timeframe display bug fixes in Results.tsx, timeframe propagation fixes in localCandleAnalysis.ts, and Results screen layout updates to match reference designs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key changes of every component, page, and service in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, card, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Advance Signal Pro' that mounts the React root and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Dashboard, AnalyzeChart, ProcessingScreen, Results (with $id param), History, and Settings, wrapped in a ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using a useCamera hook that displays a live video preview and allows users to capture, retake, or stop the camera, with all UI text and error messages in Portuguese.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: A React canvas component that renders a chart image with overlaid support/resistance lines (dashed green/red) and a directional arrow indicating buy or sell signals.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: A drag-and-drop/click/paste file upload component for images that validates file size (max 10MB) and calls a callback with the selected file.
A list item component that displays a historical analysis entry with its signal direction, confidence percentage, timestamp, and WIN/LOSS badge.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A root layout component that wraps routed pages with a toast provider and a footer crediting Advance Signal Pro and caffeine.ai.
A UI component that shows a single processing step with an animated progress bar, spinner, and completion checkmark based on active/complete state.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: A simple layout component that renders a labeled settings row with a description on the left and an arbitrary control element on the right.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: A card component that displays a trading signal (COMPRA, VENDA, NEUTRO, SEM ENTRADA) with confidence percentage, trend direction badge, and optional strength indicator.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: An empty configuration file, likely a placeholder for API configuration settings.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: A React context provider that manages light/dark theme state, persists it to localStorage, and applies the theme class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: React hook that listens for paste events and extracts image files from the clipboard, returning the captured image and any permission errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdownTimer.ts: React hook that counts down from a given number of seconds, returning the formatted time remaining, a finished flag, and raw seconds left.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including analyses, user settings, and daily operation progress via the canister actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Thin wrapper hook that combines useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings into a single interface for reading and updating user settings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind, defines light/dark CSS custom properties, and adds styles for processing bars, range inputs, and touch targets.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component that lets users select a chart image via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then stores it in sessionStorage and navigates to the processing page.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Home dashboard page displaying the app branding, AI status badge, and navigation buttons to analyze charts, view history, and access settings.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Displays a paginated list of past chart analyses fetched via `useGetAnalyses`, showing a loading spinner, empty state with a CTA, or a list of `HistoryListItem` components.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Runs a multi-stage animated processing flow that reads a chart image from sessionStorage, performs local candle analysis, and navigates to the results page; handles chart-detection errors and retries.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Renders the full analysis result (signal, trend, confidence, patterns, probabilities, support/resistance) from sessionStorage, includes a countdown timer for the trade entry window and a win/loss feedback mechanism.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing users to configure AI sensitivity, default timeframe, notifications, daily operation limit, and theme; persists values to both localStorage and the backend via custom hooks.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: Empty file with no exported content.
frontend/src/services/localCandleAnalysi: Client-side chart analysis service that processes an uploaded image via pixel scanning to detect bullish/bearish candle columns, support/resistance levels, and derives a trading signal, trend, and confidence score.
frontend/src/types/analysisTypes.ts: TypeScript interface `LocalAnalysisResult` defining the shape of the client-side candle analysis output, including trend, signal, confidence, patterns, probabilities, and timeframe.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: TypeScript interfaces for the external chart-analysis API response (`ApiAnalysisResponse`) and errors (`ApiError`), with detailed JSDoc describing the mandatory 6-step rule-based analysis contract.
frontend/src/utils/dataUrlToFile.ts: Converts a base64 data URL string into a File object, returning null for any invalid, malformed, or non-base64 input without throwing errors.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Converts a nanosecond bigint timestamp into a human-readable Portuguese date/time string (e.g., '5 de Jan de 2024 às 14:30').
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Defines the serialisable AnalysisResult interface and maps a LocalAnalysisResult object to it for storage in sessionStorage and use on the Results page.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Shares a formatted Portuguese analysis summary via the Web Share API, falling back to clipboard copy (with legacy execCommand support) if sharing is unavailable.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended spacing/shadow/radius values, accordion keyframes, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 55) for Advance Signal Pro, documenting architecture, existing features, known bugs (analysis errors, timeframe display, settings persistence), and fix requests.
